title: MabasaBee603163/BankOps-AI-MCP-Server
summary: BankOps AI MCP Server 是一个使用 Python 和模型上下文协议构建的安全、AI 辅助的银行操作原型。该项目展示了如何通过受控工具、基于角色的权限、审计日志和工作流程编排，使大型语言模型安全地与银行操作基础设施交互。
description: BankOps AI MCP Server is a secure, AI-assisted banking operations prototype built with Python and the Model Context Protocol. The project demonstrates how a large language model can safely interact with operational banking infrastructure through controlled tools, role-based permissions, audit loggin
